# Crimson Rite Bearer

## Tier 2 Support

A ritual leader who enforces the sacred rite through blood, marking intruders and empowering their followers through devotion and sacrifice.

**Motives & Tactics:** Mark targets, empower allies, control the battlefield from a distance

> Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: 12/24 | HP: 8 | Stress 3
> ATK: +2 | Halberd: Very Close | 2d12+2 mag
> Experience: Rituals +2, Fallen Lore +2

## Features

**Crimson Wings - Passive:** The Crimson Rite Bearer can fly. While flying, it can move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.

**Chorus of Devotion - Action:** Spend a Fear to spotlight 1d4 allies within Far range. Attacks they make while spotlighted this way deal half damage.

**Spiral of Terror - Action:** Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, mark a Stress to make the target [_Spiraling_](/mechanics/conditions/) until the end of the scene.

**Cult's Rebuke - Passive:** When the Crimson Rite Bearer marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.

**Momentum - Reaction:** When this adversary makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
